name: Red Lobster Cheese Rolls No. 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees.
2. Mix bisquick, cold water, and cheese in a large bowl until combined.
3. Drop the mixture by spoonfuls onto a greased baking sheet.
4. Bake for 8-10 minutes.
5. After removing from the oven (while still hot), brush melted butter or margarine mixed with garlic powder, parsley flakes, and Italian seasonings on top of each roll.
- Amounts will vary depending on the size batch you make, but a little goes a long way.
6. Serve hot.
